title: Rohdea pachynema
taxonomy: Rohdea pachynema is classified within the family Asparagaceae, specifically within the subfamily Agavoideae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf structure and flower arrangement. The Asparagaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, including many species of asparagus, agave, and yucca. Rohdea pachynema is native to Japan and is often grown in gardens for its attractive foliage and ability to thrive in shaded conditions. Within the Asparagaceae family, the Agavoideae subfamily is characterized by its succulent or semi-succulent plants, often with thick, waxy leaves.
